title: God Does Real
description: The story of televangelist Dilterton “The Boy Who Saw Heaven” Timble’s custody case and the godless lawyer, Lincoln Gumb.
quote: In heaven I played paintball with Princess Diana.
altHero: actor playing Dilterton Timble, bathed in light and amongst the clouds
alt2: Lincoln Gumb snorting cocaine off his desk and screaming
alt3: Dilterton with glowing eyes and outstretched arms
alt4: Lincoln Gumb frightened by a crucifix
